nodes.label: AI as efficient reference and troubleshooting tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or generic suggestion provider

nodes.label: AI for coding error resolution

nodes.label: AI for generic technical support

nodes.label_negative: AI limited to existing knowledge, unable to generate truly novel paths

nodes.label: Research efficiency and time savings

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI in straightforward tasks
nodes.grounding_span: they were certainly useful when they needed to be

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI for nuanced model design
nodes.grounding_span: the answers that AI might give you to try and improve them are often generic and not applicable

nodes.label: Empirical trial-and-error approach to model development
nodes.grounding_span: trial and error was the best way to go, rather than blindly trust the suggestions of an AI tool
